heading: Residence outside the United States
label: 1003 Residence outside the United States
text: For purposes of , with respect to any month, an individual shall be regarded as residing outside the United States if, on the first day of the month, the individual so resides outside the United States.section 1001 of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsFor prior provisions, see note set out under .section 1001 of this title
